Scripts.OnClick: if arg1 == "LeftButton" and not IsControlKeyDown() and TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton == nil then TurtleRP.OpenAdmin() end
Scripts.OnEnter: GameTooltip:SetOwner(this, "ANCHOR_LEFT") GameTooltip:SetText("TurtleRP") GameTooltip:AddLine("Left Click: Open settings", 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("Ctrl + Left Click + Drag: Move icon", 0.8, 0.8, 0.8) GameTooltip:Show()
Scripts.OnMouseDown: if arg1 == "LeftButton" and IsControlKeyDown() then local newLeft = TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:GetLeft() local newTop = TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:GetTop() TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton = newLeft * newTop TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:StartMoving() else TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton = nil end
Scripts.OnMouseUp:
if arg1 == "LeftButton" and IsControlKeyDown() then TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:StopMovingOrSizing() local newLeft = TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:GetLeft() local newTop = TurtleRP_MinimapIcon:GetTop()
if TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton ~= (newLeft * newTop) then TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton = true TurtleRP.SaveMinimapIconPosition() else TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton = nil end else TurtleRP.movingMinimapButton = nil end
